hero.badge: 🎓 A Leading Platform for Skills Development
hero.description: Welcome to Extrain Web — The leading website and software marketplace in Bangladesh. We provide premium website templates, ready-made software scripts, and professional digital solutions to help your business grow online.

homeCategory.title: Explore Our Course Categories
homeCategory.subtitle: Choose from 8+ categories and start your learning journey today

popularCourse.description: At Extrain Web, we provide premium digital products customized to meet the evolving needs of today's businesses. Whether you're launching a startup or scaling an enterprise, our ready-made solutions are designed to help you succeed online.
popularCourse.joinThousands: Join thousands of successful businesses today

seminarEvent.description: Whether you're a student or a working professional, our interactive seminars and industry events are crafted to educate, motivate, and equip you for a successful career in the tech industry. Gain valuable insights from experienced professionals.
seminarEvent.seminarDesc: Unlock your potential with guidance from industry leaders.
seminarEvent.eventsDesc: Build your network through meaningful connections.

whatWeProvide.subtitle: We provide high-quality digital solutions, from ready-made website scripts to custom software development, ensuring your business stays ahead.

features.premiumDesignDesc: We deliver world-class website designs and clean, efficient code that ensures lightning-fast performance and an exceptional user experience.
features.readyScriptsDesc: Access our extensive library of over 500 premium website scripts, software, and themes from Extrain Web, ready to launch your online business in minutes.
features.lifetimeSupportDesc: Your success is our priority. We provide lifetime technical support and regular security updates for all our digital products to keep you worry-free.

concerns.subtitle: We collaborate with leading organizations, universities, and institutions to provide the best learning experience.

successHistory.subtitle: At Extrain Web, our students grow with confidence, master their crafts, and build successful careers. Their success is what drives us to create more possibilities.

eventsPage.subtitle: Connect with industry experts and gain practical insights into the latest tech trends.

coursesPage.subtitle: Unlock practical, in-demand courses designed to align with your career goals.

courseDetails.checkBack: Check back soon for instructor details.

aboutPage.subtitle: Hub of digital innovation. We are committed to building a digitally empowered Bangladesh.
aboutPage.description1: Our products cover a wide range of in-demand digital solutions, including e-commerce scripts, business management software, portfolio templates, SaaS applications, and custom development services.
aboutPage.description2: At Extrain Web, we believe in quality, innovation, and building a supportive community. Our mission is to provide the best digital products and empower businesses to succeed online.
aboutPage.ceoMessage: Empowering businesses with the right digital tools is the key to unlocking global opportunities. At Extrain Web, we don't just sell products; we prepare your business to lead the future.
aboutPage.globalLeadershipDesc: To be the world's leading digital marketplace, providing premium solutions that shape the future of online businesses globally.
aboutPage.employmentGoalsDesc: Our goal is to serve over 50,000 businesses by 2030, actively contributing to building the Digital Bangladesh and helping entrepreneurs succeed online.
aboutPage.practicalSkillsDesc: We're committed to providing businesses with practical digital solutions, developing the core foundation for success in a rapidly changing digital world.
aboutPage.careerPathsDesc: We provide industry-focused solutions that open up a variety of business opportunities, empowering more entrepreneurs to excel online.
aboutPage.pioneersDesc: We focus on practical, industry-relevant solutions that prepare businesses for success in the digital world.
aboutPage.growthDesc: We believe in continuous innovation and development, helping businesses expand their potential and adapt to the evolving digital landscape.
aboutPage.impactDesc: We measure our success by the impact our products have on businesses and their contributions to the digital ecosystem.
aboutPage.communityDesc: We foster a supportive environment where collaboration and shared success drive collective growth.
aboutPage.excellenceSubtitle: Setting the standard for digital solutions.
aboutPage.excellenceDesc: We are committed to delivering high-quality, cutting-edge products that empower businesses to innovate and lead in their industries.

contactPage.subtitle: Have questions about our products or services? We're here to help! Reach out and let's start a conversation about your business needs.
contactPage.subject: Subject
contactPage.socialDescription: Stay connected with us on social media for updates, tips, and more!
contactPage.whatsappDescription: Chat with us directly on WhatsApp for instant support.
contactPage.messageResponse: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.ctaDescription: Join the elite ranks of creators and developers building the next generation of digital experiences.
footer.brandDescription: Extrain Web is a premium website and software marketplace in Bangladesh, providing high-quality digital products and custom development services to empower your business.
footer.addressValue: Daisy Garden, House 14, Block A, Banasree, Dhaka-1219

mentorsPage.subtitle: Behind the leading IT skill development platform, masterminds of industry leaders are working. From the management to the expert mentors, highly skilled people are dedicated to your skill advancement.
